name: tdd-lean
hypothesis: TDD-style generator (tests before implementation) + further adversary reduction (6 challenges, 8 min). Tests-first should catch edge cases earlier, reducing adversary's value. If DoD holds at ≥14/task with fewer adversary minutes, we confirm adversary is over-contributing.

changes.planner: Added DoD cap of 3 per feature (down from 4). Kept coverage matrix and requirement extraction.
changes.generator: Rewritten for TDD: write failing tests for each DoD criterion FIRST, then implement until green. Feature-by-feature.
changes.adversary: Reduced from 8→6 challenges, 12→8 min. Kept reproduction commands. Removed demands-for-evidence (evaluator handles this).
changes.evaluator: Unchanged from cand-0001. Zero-tolerance + progress delta.
changes.skill: Reduced adversary timeout 12→8 min. All else same as cand-0001.
